options.queryReplacement: ={{ [ $json.correlation_id, $json.health_score, $json.health_status, $json.summary, JSON.stringify($json.metrics || {}), JSON.stringify($json.recommendations || []), JSON.stringify($json.raids || []), JSON.stringify($json.actions || []), $json.idempotency_key, JSON.stringify({ content: $json.discord_content }) ] }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { ok: true, snapshot_id: $json.snapshot_id, health_score: $json.health_score, health_status: $json.health_status, raid_count: $json.raid_count, action_count: $json.action_count } }];
